name: lq
description: LegalQuants community access for Claude Code. The /lq cold-start interview gives members an 'I know you' greeting derived from their corpus activity, plus /lq:ask (cross-MCP synthesis) and the /lq:assess workflow. Two read-only HTTP MCP servers auto-register — lqchat-mcp (primary-source sanitized chat: 14 channels, ~19k messages, pseudonymized members, attachments) and lqbrain-mcp (LQBrain synthesis vault: ~707 curated wikilinked notes — insights, debates, projects, tools, people, events, MOCs, questions). The /lq interview routes attribution/recency questions to chat and synthesis/position questions to brain; /lq:ask fans out to BOTH in parallel (chat + brain explorer subagents) and merges into one cited answer. Two auto-loaded model-guidance skills teach each MCP. Members sign in via a Firebase device-code flow on legalquants.com (Google → 7-day session cookie cached locally); both MCPs verify the cookie keylessly against Google's public certs (no service-account key) and require the lqMember claim. Guests use the shared LQ_MCP_TOKEN bearer.
